---
name: 💡 Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Rune
title: "[Feature] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## 💡 Feature Description

<!-- A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see. -->

## 🎯 Use Case / Problem

<!-- What problem does this solve? Who benefits from it? -->
<!-- e.g. "When editing long documents, there is no way to… which means I have to…" -->

## 🖼 Proposed Solution

<!-- How would you like this to work? Include any API sketches, mockups, or examples. -->

```js
// Example of how you'd expect to use the feature
editor.cmd('myNewCommand');
```

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

<!-- Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds? Why are they not sufficient? -->

## 📊 Priority / Impact

<!-- How important is this to your use case? Does it block you or is it a nice-to-have? -->

- [ ] Blocking — I cannot use Rune without this
- [ ] High — significantly improves my workflow
- [ ] Medium — would be nice to have
- [ ] Low — minor improvement

## 🗒 Additional Context

<!-- Any screenshots, references to similar editors, or other context. -->
